description: The Suey Sing Association is a historical Chinese American association established in 1867. Formerly known as the Suey Sing Tong, it changed to its current name in 1920. In 1994, it became the first Chinese community organization to fly the flag of the People's Republic of China. It has branches across the United States and Canada with over 1000 members.

country_links.context: The Suey Sing Association has a branch in Richmond, British Columbia, Canada.
